request: Two CLI fixes: (1) bug — obj/template/manifest.json is being cp'd to target root by freshInstall/forceInstall as a side-effect of the recursive copy; filter it out so it never lands in target (keep in tarball for provenance). (2) behavior change — make .npmrc materialization opt-in via new --with-npmrc CLI flag (default: don't write). Touches src/cli/install.js, bin/cli.js, tests/, HELP_TEXT, docs.
